settings.title: Choose or configure a package
settings.description: Start with a ready-made package or build your own system. Our engineers review it for free.

settings.title: Free roof check
settings.description: Upload photo & address — we calculate tilt, shading and yield within 24 hours.

settings.title: Delivery from Wr. Neustadt
settings.description: Shipping within Austria in 3–5 business days. Germany delivery on request. Pallet delivered right to your door.

settings.title: DIY or partner installation
settings.description: Connect it yourself with our video guide — or we arrange certified installers in your area.

settings.title: Brand-independent
settings.description: We’re not tied to any manufacturer — we recommend what really fits your roof. 8 inverter brands in stock.

settings.title: Ships from Austria
settings.description: Central warehouse in Wiener Neustadt. No customs, no 6-week container lottery. Pallets at your door in 3–5 business days.

settings.title: 25-year warranty
settings.description: On modules and inverters. We handle the process — not you with a manufacturer in Shenzhen.

settings.title: DIY or installer
settings.description: Installation videos for self-assembly. Or we arrange certified electricians from your area at a fixed price.

settings.question: Is a PV system still worth it at current electricity prices?
settings.answer: Yes — more clearly than ever. Electricity prices in Austria remain at an average of 34 cents/kWh for households even after the 2023 peak. For a typical 10 kWp system with 60 % self-consumption, the system pays for itself in 6–8 years. The zero VAT rate (0 % up to 20 kWp) shortens that further.

settings.question: I don’t understand the technology. Can I still order?
settings.answer: That’s exactly what our complete packages are for. Modules, inverters, mounting system and cables are pre-matched — you don’t need to calculate anything.

settings.question: What happens if an inverter fails in 8 years?
settings.answer: We handle the warranty for you. We offer 25-year product warranty on modules and 10–12 years on inverters (extendable to 20).

settings.question: Do you deliver to Germany?
settings.answer: Yes, delivery to Germany is possible — with an additional 3–5 business days transit time and German VAT rate.

settings.question: What do I need from my grid operator?
settings.answer: A registration of the generation system — either you do it yourself or we handle it for a flat fee of € 190.

settings.question: Can I install the modules myself?
settings.answer: The mechanical installation yes. The electrical connection must be carried out by a licensed electrician. We arrange electricians from € 490.
